title: Senior Teacher - Anna University - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Anna University - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Anna University. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Teacher to strengthen our Jabalpur-based team.

About Anna University:
Anna University is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Research Skills

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Anna University!
